CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Federated Capital Services.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Rory Dennis aka Rory Diarmuid Dennis, ind and as a partner in Adventure U.S.A., a General Partnership; and Christian Watts aka Christian Philip Watts, ind and as partner in Adventure U.S.A., a General Partnership (by stipulation) as follows:
Damages $24,453.37
Prejudgment Interest $2,680.00
Attorney's Fees $2,775.00
Costs $456.80, for a total of $30,365.17
Plaintiff is also entitled to the possession of the vehicle, fully described in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
